diagram_title: Dynamic Context Layer - C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: Session orchestration runtime that assembles prompts and invokes model calls.

containers.name: Session Prompt Pipeline
containers.description: Prompt assembly and tool/skill coordination surfaces.

components.name: LLM Assembler
components.description: Builds system prompt parts and emits prompt telemetry.

components.name: Skill Loader
components.description: Loads skill content and is the candidate entry point for skill lifecycle metadata.

components.name: Tool Resolver
components.description: Resolves tools and already contains on-demand idle lifecycle logic for MCP connections.

components.name: Prompt Orchestrator
components.description: Coordinates per-turn prompt preparation and run-loop behavior.

components.name: Telemetry Surface
components.description: Records prompt-layer decisions for later inspection and validation.

relationships.description: Prepares each round and invokes prompt assembly
Supplies skill-layer content/metadata to future managed injection
Provides reference lifecycle pattern for idle-managed optional capabilities
Emits block-level prompt telemetry and layer state evidence
